response:
```sql
WITH monthly_signups AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS signups
  FROM users
  GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)
),
monthly_growth AS (
  SELECT
    month,
    signups,
    LAG(signups, 1) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS prev_month_signups
  FROM monthly_signups
)
SELECT
  month,
  signups,
  prev_month_signups,
  CASE
    WHEN prev_month_signups = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE (signups - prev_month_signups) * 100.0 / prev_month_signups
  END AS growth_rate_percentage
FROM monthly_growth
ORDER BY month;
```
